name: Blueberry Pudding Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Place blueberries and lemon juice in an 8x8 inch pan.
2. Mix flour, baking powder, salt, nutmeg, and 3/4 cup sugar in a separate bowl.
3. In another bowl, beat together milk, egg, melted butter, and vanilla until well combined.
4. Pour the wet ingredients over the dry ingredients and stir until just mixed.
5. Spread the batter evenly over the blueberries.
6. Sprinkle the remaining 1 cup of sugar with cornstarch over the top of the batter.
7. Carefully pour boiling water over the entire mixture.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 40-50 minutes, or until set and golden brown.
